series_metadata.series_description: Records submitted by ombudsman detailing complaints from the public and attempts to resolve issues. This records series includes the logs of telephone calls between outside callers and the department''s ombudsmen. These logs record the main issue or question discussed and the time taken to resolve the call.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: paper in operating area imaged and indexed. Once confirmed paper copy has been checked accuracy, quality, and completeness ; Electronic: electronic record
